description: The Nullion Circle started its work during the Heating, as a mostly pacifist group of private security against the rising protests and rallies. Now hired for their practised disruption abilities, they can steer the course of battle without firing a single bullet.

rule.name: Confusion Gas
rule.description: Units inside your Smoke have a Movement characteristic of at most 1, -1 to Control and cannot be the target of Commands.

scheme.name: Prevent Advancements
scheme.description:
If there are no enemy units in your half of the map, you gain 5 VP.
Otherwise, you gain 1 CP.

commands.name: Cut Coms
commands.when: When an enemy player makes an Action
commands.effects: Cancel that Action unless that player pays 1CP

commands.name: Provoke Interference
commands.when: When an enemy player makes an Action that targets an enemy unit.
commands.targets:
That enemy unit.
An allied unit within 2 Tiles with Line of Sight to the enemy.
commands.effects: Cancel that Action unless that player pays 1 Secondary Order.

commands.name: Mixed Signals
commands.when: When an enemy unit declares targets for an Indirect Fire weapon
commands.effects: Change the target of that weapon's shots to a legal target of your choice. The target tile must include an allied unit.

abilities.name: Collect Field Info
abilities.description:
As a Primary Action: as an additional cost, spend a Secondary Action. You gain 1 CP.
This ability has Loading 1.

abilities.name: Smoke Generator
abilities.description: As a secondary action: place Smoke on target adjacent tile. That Smoke has Timed 8.

abilities.name: Quick Clear
abilities.description: This unit can Conquer and Occupy adjacent empty Objective.

abilities.name: Thermal Movement
abilities.description: When an opponent Orders an enemy unit inside Smoke, that unit looses 3 Dodge until the end of the next turn.

abilities.name: Short Jam
abilities.description:
When an opponent makes an Action that targets an enemy unit within 2 tiles, you may cancel that action and refund its costs. That opponent cannot make that exact Action again this turn.
This ability has Loading 2.

abilities.name: Provide Cover
abilities.description: As a Primary action: place Smoke on 2 target tiles within Range that are adjaent to each other. That Smoke has Timed 8
